sections.heading: Issue
sections.body: Produce a first-pass internal memo about parties, obligations, deadlines, signatures, and data-quality flags from these scanned filings.

sections.heading: Compliance Review Memo
sections.body:
- This first-pass summary concerns scanned SEC-related filings reflected in the supplied evidence, including sec_vprr_02000258.pdf, sec_vprr_02000259.pdf, and sec_vprr_07040010.pdf. [295c87b911042976:fields] [f292902ed5f80a01:p2:c0] [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_878a3b64d748`

citation_quotes.f292902ed5f80a01:p2:c0: filings are made by the Filer with the Commission
citation_quotes.ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0: FORM D UNITED STATES SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE COMMISSION

sections.heading: Parties
sections.body:
- For sec_vprr_02000258.pdf, the extracted fields identify the filer/issuer as Kabushiki Kaisha Asahi Ginko. [295c87b911042976:fields]
  - claim_id: `claim_406a48c43b75`
- For sec_vprr_02000258.pdf, the extracted fields identify the U.S. agent for service of process as Eiji Ohashi, General Manager of The Asahi Bank, Ltd. New York Branch. [295c87b911042976:fields]
  - claim_id: `claim_441e41a1a6a6`
- For sec_vprr_02000258.pdf, the extracted fields identify the signatory for the filer as Mr. Hideki Fukushima, Chief Deputy General Manager. [295c87b911042976:fields]
  - claim_id: `claim_13eca107ddd9`
- The Form D in sec_vprr_07040010.pdf identifies the name of offering as Stella Station Trust. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_0e071143801c`
- The Form D in sec_vprr_07040010.pdf identifies the issuer as Stella Station Trust. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_0dc7969cc9df`
- The issuer address shown for Stella Station Trust is 11690 Grooms Road, Cincinnati, OH 45242, with telephone number 513 554 1110. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_a912b6a33ef6`

citation_quotes.ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0: Name of Offering: Stella Station Trust

sections.heading: Documents Reviewed
sections.body:
- The extracted fields describe sec_vprr_02000258.pdf as Amendment No. 1 to Form F-X, Appointment of Agent for Service of Process and Undertaking. [295c87b911042976:fields]
  - claim_id: `claim_4e0c64147dcd`
- The extracted fields for sec_vprr_02000258.pdf reference a related Form CB filing, file number 5-51260, barcode/reference 02000258, and SEC received/processed date of January 29, 2002. [295c87b911042976:fields]
  - claim_id: `claim_9573fd0ad788`
- sec_vprr_07040010.pdf is a Form D notice of sale of securities pursuant to Regulation D, Section 4(6), and/or Uniform Limited Offering Exemption. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_f78de95b1b90`

citation_quotes.295c87b911042976:fields: document_type: Amendment No. 1 to Form F-X, Appointment of Agent for Service of Process and Undertaking
citation_quotes.ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0: FORM D NOTICE OF SALE OF SECURITIES PURSUANT TO REGULATION D, SECTION 4(6), AND/OR UNIFORM LIMITED OFFERING EXEMPTION

sections.heading: Material Facts
sections.body:
- The Form D indicates Rule 506 was checked, while Rule 504, Rule 505, Section 4(6), and ULOE were unchecked. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_bad241d2df7d`
- The Form D indicates the filing type was a new filing, with amendment unchecked. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_48c680068741`
- The Form D describes the issuer’s business as purchasing, holding, leasing, managing, selling, exchanging, redeveloping, subdividing, and improving real property and interests in real property. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_bc8be7f8d947`
- The Form D indicates the issuer’s type of business organization was business trust. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_07ef05d0c632`
- The Form D states that the issuer did not intend to sell, and had not sold, to non-accredited investors in the offering. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p3:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_28f8d480d9ee`
- The minimum investment accepted from any individual on the Form D is listed as $0.00. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p3:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_afa23b1a4eb9`
- The Form D indicates the offering did not permit joint ownership of a single unit. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p3:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_0d2e966195b1`
- The Form D lists no person paid or given commission or similar remuneration for solicitation of purchasers in connection with sales of securities in the offering. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p3:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_2c5e4c84da09`
- The Form D records accredited-investor purchases of $10,400.00 and non-accredited-investor purchases of $0.00. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p4:c1]
  - claim_id: `claim_4aaa02dd445f`
- The Form D lists $0.00 for Rule 505, Regulation A, Rule 504, and total sales in the twelve months prior to the first sale of securities in the offering. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p4:c1]
  - claim_id: `claim_058d62eb6ce2`
- The Form D lists $0.00 for transfer agent fees, printing and engraving costs, legal fees, accounting fees, engineering fees, sales commissions, other expenses, and total expenses. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p4:c1]
  - claim_id: `claim_6a84acbf380d`
- The Form F-X language states that service of process on the agent and service of an administrative subpoena on the agent shall be taken and held as valid and binding as if personal service had been made. [295c87b911042976:p2:c1] [f292902ed5f80a01:p2:c0]
  - claim_id: `claim_01e4e4421f52`
- The Form F-X language requires a filer using specified forms to appoint a successor agent for service of process and file an amended Form F-X if the filer discharges the agent or the agent becomes unwilling or unable to accept service on behalf of the filer. [295c87b911042976:p2:c1] [f292902ed5f80a01:p2:c2]
  - claim_id: `claim_06b707b988d0`
- For certain Form F-X contexts, the obligation to appoint a successor agent and file an amended Form F-X extends until six years have elapsed from the relevant triggering date; confirm before treating as a deadline because the supplied excerpts show different triggering language for different form types. [295c87b911042976:p2:c1] [f292902ed5f80a01:p2:c2] [295c87b911042976:fields]
  - claim_id: `claim_0f8b8ed7f588`

sections.heading: Procedural Posture
sections.body:
- The Form D instructions state that five copies of the notice must be filed with the SEC, one of which must be manually signed. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c2]
  - claim_id: `claim_dcbe1a1a4939`
- The Form D instructions state that any copies not manually signed must be photocopies of the manually signed copy or bear typed or printed signatures. [ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c2]
  - claim_id: `claim_c718d8ae3077`
- The extracted fields state that the related Form CB was filed January 10, 2002, the document was signed January 24, 2002, and SEC received/processed stamps show January 29, 2002. [295c87b911042976:fields]
  - claim_id: `claim_c910bb82ea0d`

citation_quotes.ab8261141dc1f5ba:p1:c2: Five (5) copies of this notice must be filed with the SEC, one of which must be manually signed
citation_quotes.295c87b911042976:fields: Date filed for related Form CB: January 10, 2002. Document signed: January 24, 2002. SEC received/processed stamps: January 29, 2002

sections.heading: Items Requiring Verification
sections.body:
- Document is a scanned image with no text layer; transcription is based on visual reading.
  - claim_id: `claim_28b488743f6a`
- Stamps, handwritten notation, and signatures contain low-confidence or non-verbatim elements. [295c87b911042976:fields]
  - claim_id: `claim_cb7f51ce4c3f`
- Small text in the SEC received stamp on page 1 of sec_vprr_02000258.pdf is partially unclear, and the top stamp on page 1 is partly cut off or unclear. [295c87b911042976:fields]
  - claim_id: `claim_b01465b3985b`

citation_quotes.295c87b911042976:fields: signatures are handwritten and not fully transcribed

evidence.text:
Extracted fields for sec_vprr_02000258.pdf:
amounts_or_deadlines: Undertakings include appointment of successor agent and amended Form F-X obligations for periods including until six years have elapsed from specified triggering dates, depending on the form type; for Form CB, until six years have elapsed following the effective date of the latest amendment to such Form CB.
dates: Date filed for related Form CB: January 10, 2002. Document signed: January 24, 2002. SEC received/processed stamps: January 29, 2002.
document_type: Amendment No. 1 to Form F-X, Appointment of Agent for Service of Process and Undertaking
parties: Filer/issuer: Kabushiki Kaisha Asahi Ginko. U.S. agent for service of process: Eiji Ohashi, General Manager of The Asahi Bank, Ltd. New York Branch. Signatory for filer: Mr. Hideki Fukushima, Chief Deputy General Manager.
recording_references: Related filing: Form CB; file number 5-51260; barcode/reference 02000258; SEC received/processed January 29, 2002.
unclear_items: Small text in SEC received stamp on page 1 is partially unclear; signatures are handwritten and not fully transcribed; top stamp on page 1 partly cut off/unclear.

it is received by the SEC at the address given below or, if received at that address after the date on which it is due, on the date it was mailed by United States registered or certified mail to that address. Where To File: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, 450 Fifth Street, N.W., Washington, D.C. 20549. Copies Required: Five (5) copies of this notice must be filed with the SEC, one of which must be manually signed. Any copies not manually signed must be photocopies of the manually signed copy or bear typed or printed signatures. Information Required: A new filing must contain all information requested. Amendments need only report the name of the issuer and offering, any changes thereto, the information requested in Part C, and any material changes from the information previously supplied in Parts A and B. Part E and the Appendix need not be filed with the SEC. Filing Fee: There is no federal filing fee. State: This notice shall be used to indicate reliance on the Uniform Limited Offering Exemption (ULOE) for sales of securities

B. INFORMATION ABOUT OFFERING 1. Has the issuer sold, or does the issuer intend to sell, to non-accredited investors in this offering? Yes [unchecked] No [checked] Answer also in Appendix, Column 2, if filing under ULOE. 2. What is the minimum investment that will be accepted from any individual? $ 0.00 3. Does the offering permit joint ownership of a single unit? Yes [unchecked] No [checked] 4. Enter the information requested for each person who has been or will be paid or given, directly or indirectly, any commission or similar remuneration for solicitation of purchasers in connection with sales of securities in the offering. If a person to be listed is an associated person or agent of a broker or dealer registered with the SEC and/or with a state or states, list the name of the broker or dealer. If more than five (5) persons to be listed are associated persons of such a broker or dealer, you may set forth the information for that broker or dealer only. Full Name: None Business or Residence Address: [blank] Name of Associated

respect to which filings are made by the Filer with the Commission on Schedule 13E-4F, 14D-1F or 14D-9F; or (iv) the securities in relation to which the Filer acts as trustee pursuant to an exemption under Rule 10a-5 under the Trust Indenture Act of 1939. The Filer stipulates and agrees that any such civil suit or action or administrative proceeding may be commenced by the service of process upon, and that service of an administrative subpoena shall be effected by service upon such agent for service of process, and that service as aforesaid shall be taken and held in all courts and administrative tribunals to be valid and binding as if personal service thereof had been made. F. Each person filing this Form in connection with: (a) the use of Form F-9, F-10, 40-F, or SB-2 or Schedule 13E-4F, 14D-1F or 14D-9F stipulates and agrees to appoint a successor agent for service of process and file an amended Form F-X if the Filer discharges the Agent or the Agent is unwilling or unable to accept service on behalf of the

FORM D UNITED STATES SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE COMMISSION Washington, D.C. 20549 FORM D NOTICE OF SALE OF SECURITIES PURSUANT TO REGULATION D, SECTION 4(6), AND/OR UNIFORM LIMITED OFFERING EXEMPTION Handwritten/printed number at top: 1386733 OMB APPROVAL OMB Number: 3235-0076 Estimated average burden hours per response . . . . . . 16.00 SEC USE ONLY Barcode/serial: 07040010 Name of Offering: Stella Station Trust Filing Under (Check box(es) that apply): Rule 504 [unchecked] Rule 505 [unchecked] Rule 506 [checked] Section 4(6) [unchecked] ULOE [unchecked] Type of Filing: New Filing [checked] Amendment [unchecked] A. BASIC IDENTIFICATION DATA 1. Enter the information requested about the issuer Name of Issuer: Stella Station Trust Address of Executive Offices: 11690 Grooms Road, Cincinnati, OH 45242 Telephone Number: 513 554 1110 Address of Principal Business Operations: [blank] Brief Description of Business: Purchase, hold, lease, manage, sell, exchange, redevelop, subdivide and improve real property and interests in real property Type of Business Organization: business trust [checked]; corporation [unchecked]; limited partnership, already formed [unchecked]; limited partnership, to be formed [unchecked]; other [unchecked] Actual or Estimated Date of Incorporation or

Amount of Purchases $10,400.00 Non-accredited Investors: Number Investors 0; Aggregate Dollar Amount of Purchases $0.00 Total (for filings under Rule 504 only): [blank] 3. If this filing is for an offering under Rule 504 or 505, enter the information requested for all securities sold by the issuer, to date, in offerings of the types indicated, in the twelve (12) months prior to the first sale of securities in this offering. Rule 505: $0.00 Regulation A: $0.00 Rule 504: $0.00 Total: $0.00 4.a. Furnish a statement of all expenses in connection with the issuance and distribution of the securities in this offering. Transfer Agent’s Fees: $0.00 Printing and Engraving Costs: $0.00 Legal Fees: $0.00 Accounting Fees: $0.00 Engineering Fees: $0.00 Sales Commissions: $0.00 Other Expenses: $0.00 Total: $0.00 4 of 9

on Schedule 13E-4F, 14D-1F or 14D-9F; or (iv) the securities in relation to which the Filer acts as trustee pursuant to an exemption under Rule 10a-5 under the Trust Indenture Act of 1939.
